---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement to the review system, CLI, analytics, or documentation
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

What capability would you like to add or improve?

## Problem

What limitation or pain point does this address?

## Proposed Direction

Describe the change you want.

## Affected Area

- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Pipeline
- [ ] Analytics
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Manuscript outputs
- [ ] Other

## Contract Impact

Will this likely affect:

- [ ] artifact outputs
- [ ] review-state assumptions
- [ ] status or failure behavior
- [ ] observability
- [ ] no contract changes expected

## Additional Context

Any examples, use cases, or references that would help.
